challenge.explanation: Pogledajte deo gde možete videti ideas to prevent future attacks. Objašnjeno je tri ideje, ali samo dve od njih se nalaze u tačnom odgovoru na ovo pitanje. Pronađite te predloge i moći ćete da odgovorite na ovo pitanje kako treba.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.

questions.text:
Sophie piše sažetak koji je Brian tražio:

Security Breach Summary

Last week, a phishing attack targeted several team members. I spoke with Jake, our cybersecurity specialist, about what happened.

The team responded quickly after the breach was detected, isolating the affected systems in minutes, and limiting the damage.

Jake mentioned, however, that there was some confusion about team roles during the incident. He recommended clearer roles in our incident response plan.

Ideas to prevent future attacks:

  • Updating security training to cover more on phishing detection

  • Doing security audits more often

  • Keeping software updated, since the attack used an outdated system component

Koje su dve diskutovane ideje koje mogu pomoći u sprečavanju budućih napada?

answers.answer: Ispravljanje obuke i sprovođenje dodatnih sigurnosnih inspekcija.
Zapositi više IT radnika i promeniti vođe tima.
answers.feedback: Ovi koraci nisu bili pomenuti kao načini za sprečavanje napada.
Ove posebne mere nisu spomenute u diskusijama.

answers.answer: Promeniti trenutni sistem i koristiti štampane izveštaje.
answers.feedback: Ove ideje nisu bile diskutovane tokom razgovora.

challenge.title: Vežba 48
